en: I'm not your kid You said you were going to Chicago
My daughter can't see me this weekend She's going skiing
ko: 내 딸은 이번 주말에 나를 못 봐.

en: You said she was 4 years old You're lying She was 4 when I left Now she's 15
My wife's been remarried for 11 years I see Grace every now and again
I don't understand Sure you do Sometimes it's easier to live in the lie
I'm going to let you fly tonight Frank
ko: 오늘 밤 너를 자유롭게 해줄게, 프랭크.

en: I'm not even going to try to stop you Because I know you'll be back on Monday Yeah
ko: 나는 너를 막으려고 하지도 않을 거야.

en: How do you know I'll come back Look
ko: 어떻게 내가 돌아온다는 걸 아는 거야?

en: American Airlines Flight 131 to Pittsburgh is now ready for boarding Passengers with boarding
ko: 아메리칸 항공 9131편, 피츠버그행 탑승 준비 완료.
